emails.subject: FW: American Airlines ISDA
emails.body: Richard: As you can see below, I just replied to Mark instead of forwarding to you. Credit is not throwing you off. They did send a revised worksheet. I have turned around comments and they have been reviewed by a lawyer. I have completed finalizing the comments, but since AA sent their agreement in pdf (which cannot be edited), I have had to turn around a hard copy of our comments. Can you give me a physical address where I can overnight our comments? Thanks! Marie To: Taylor, Mark E (Legal)

emails.subject: RE: American Airlines ISDA
emails.body: Contact for the ISDA with AA is Geraldine Lim. The address: PO Box 619616 Mail Drop 5662 DFW Airport, TX 75261-9616 Express Delivery: 4333 Amon Carter Blvd MNail Drop 5662 Ft. Worth, TX 76155 Phone 817-967-9209 Fax 817-967-4318 Sounds great. Thanks for the update while we are on credit watch, at least we can get these type of items taken care of. To: Friedman, Richard

emails.subject: RE: American Airlines ISDA
emails.body: Richard: Thanks for the info. I'll send it overnight to her and will copy you on my correspondence (with a copy of our comments). Marie To: Heard, Marie
